title: Dell Technologies
subtitle: Digital Marketing Assistant — Global OEM Solutions | Apr 2022 – Apr 2023

paragraphs: Supported global OEM solutions marketing for the Vietnam market within Dell's Asia-Pacific marketing division. Produced multi-format content, organized webinars, and tracked campaign performance across a multi-country portfolio.
bullets: Produced website content, email marketing campaigns, PR content and social media assets
Organised monthly webinars increasing engagement by 40% and conversion by 25%
Tracked campaign performance processing data from 1,000+ calls per week
Analysed approximately 100 VIP customer records for weekly reporting
Supported international Dell events in Vietnam and Singapore with 450+ global participants

design.typography: Bold company name; metrics in large display type

summary: Dell Technologies experience page detailing the Digital Marketing Assistant role (Apr 2022–Apr 2023) with 40% engagement increase, 25% conversion lift, and support for 450+ participant international events.
